---
title: References to test bibliography formatting
bibliography: ../../bibliography.bib
format:
  preprint-typst:
    section-numbering: "1."
    include-before-body:
      - text: "#show <refs>: set par(hanging-indent: 1.4em)"
    theme: jou
    keep-typ: true
    citeproc: true
---

This sentence refers to works [@rcoreteamLanguageEnvironmentStatistical2025; @allaireQuarto2025; @tinytable]. This one cites @allaireQuarto2025 in text, and this one cites two works again [@rcoreteamLanguageEnvironmentStatistical2025; @tinytable].

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

>A Quote
>
>---Source

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

# References

::: {#refs}
:::
